<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/contacts/{resourceType}/{resourceId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

  as={"h2"}

  title={"Body"}
>

  responses={{"200":{"description":"Resource contacts","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"contacts":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string"},"contactId":{"type":"string"},"name":{"type":"string"},"role":{"type":"string"},"phone":{"type":"string"},"email":{"type":"string"},"notes":{"type":"string"},"picture":{"type":"string"},"isPrimary":{"type":"boolean"},"createdAt":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"updatedAt":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},"title":"Contact"}},"updatedAt":{"type":"string"}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request validation error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"Missing/invalid credentials","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"403":{"description":"Insufficient permission","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}}}}
